diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,146 @@
+# Helper Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/helper/factory/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: CreateHandlersInterface, Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
+- Reads as: ../../hono (Hono), ../../hono-base (HonoOptions), ../../types (Env, H, HandlerResponse, Input, IntersectNonAnyTypes, MiddlewareHandler)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Factory helper creates app instances and handles multiple HTTP handlers. Imports Hono class and core types.
+
+## src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
+- Reads as: ../../context (Context), ../../request/constants (GET_MATCH_RESULT), ../../types (RouterRoute), ../../utils/url (getPattern, splitRoutingPath)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Exposes route matching utilities for analyzing request paths. Reads Context, types, URL utilities.
+
+## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSReadyState, WSContext, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, WebSocketHelperDefineContext, WebSocketHelperDefineHandler, defineWebSocketHelper
+- Reads as: ../../context (Context), ../../types (MiddlewareHandler, TypedResponse), ../../utils/http-status (StatusCode)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: WebSocket helper for implementing real-time connections. Defines ws:// events and helper functions.
+
+## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
+- Reads as: ../../context (Context), ../../utils/cookie (parse, parseSigned, serialize, serializeSigned)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Utility functions for reading and writing cookies with support for signed/secure/hybrid prefixes.
+
+## src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: testClient
+- Reads as: ../../client (hc), ../../client/types (Client, ClientRequestOptions), ../../context (ExecutionContext), ../../hono (Hono), ../../types (Schema), ../../utils/types (UnionToIntersection)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Creates test client from an Hono app for unit testing. Uses hc and custom execution context.
+
+## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: env, knownUserAgents, getRuntimeKey, checkUserAgentEquals
+- Reads as: globalThis, navigator, Deno, typed types (Context)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Adaptive runtime detection helper. Identifies Node, Bun, Deno, workerd, Fastly, or Edge Runtime.
+
+## src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, raw, rawCssString
+- Reads as: ../../helper/html (raw), ../../jsx/constants (DOM_RENDERER), ../../jsx/dom/css (createCssJsxDomObjects), ../../utils/html (HtmlEscapedCallback, HtmlEscapedString), ./common (Css class types, styles)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts
+- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper for server-side rendering. Generates styles dynamically with class hashing.
+
+## src/helper/css/common.ts
+- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, minify, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, rawCssString
+- Reads as: regex patterns, symbol types
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Core CSS utilities with minification and class name generation. Shares with css/index.ts.
+
+## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: proxy
+- Reads as: ../../http-exception (HTTPException), ../../utils/headers (RequestHeader), fetch
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTTP proxy helper supporting RFC 2616/9110. Handles hop-by-hop headers and connection parsing.
+
+## src/helper/dev/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
+- Reads as: ../../hono (Hono), ../../types (Env, RouterRoute), ../../utils/color (getColorEnabled), ../../utils/handler (findTargetHandler, isMiddleware)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Development helper for inspecting routes and router names. Colorized output with verbose mode.
+
+## src/helper/html/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: raw, html
+- Reads as: ../../utils/html (escapeToBuffer, raw, resolveCallbackSync, stringBufferToString)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: HTML escaping and streaming helper. Processes template literals with interpolated values.
+
+## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: ssg and re-exports
+- Reads as: ./ssg, ./middleware
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Main SSG index, re-exports helper functions from ssg.ts and middleware module.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream, streamSSE (via sse), streamText, SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi
+- Reads as: ./stream, ./sse, ./text
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts
+- Safe summary: Streaming helper index combining stream, streamSSE, and streamText capabilities.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
+- Main exports or names: stream
+- Reads as: ../../context (Context), ../../utils/stream (StreamingApi), ./utils (isOldBunVersion)
+- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
+- Safe summary: Base streaming helper for chunked responses. Reads Stream API and Bun compatibility check.
+
+## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
+- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
+- Reads as: ../../context (Context), ../../utils/html (resolveCallback), ../../utils/stream (StreamingApi), .
